heroImageAlt: People sitting together in a supportive group setting
heroShortDescription: Find The Group That's Right For You.
mainIntro1: Explore our support groups below and choose the one that best fits your situation.

cards.title: Men's Shed
cards.excerpt: A welcoming place for men to connect through shared experiences, conversation, and support.
cards.imageAlt: Men in a welcoming group setting

cards.title: Bereavement Support
cards.excerpt: A safe, friendly and relaxed bereavement drop-in group led by fully-trained volunteers.
cards.imageAlt: Countryside and sky after a storm, symbolising hope and reflection

cards.title: Carer Support
cards.excerpt: Connection, peer support and signposting for carers and people affected by palliative conditions.
cards.imageAlt: People in a welcoming group conversation

referralIntro: To enquire about any of our services please complete the
referralOutro: and a member of our team will be in touch.
